Home Dashboard Leads Sign in

Shiiman Leads turns raw permit data into qualified construction leads.

Shiiman Leads continuously aggregates public permits, project filings, and embedded organization data from multiple municipal and corporate sources. We normalize, deduplicate, and enrich the feed so you see actionable opportunities – not noise.

  • ✔Multi-source ingestion (municipal JSON APIs + dynamic HTML scraping)
  • ✔Smart filtering (status, recency, keyword, length & regex include/exclude)
  • ✔Deduplication via cryptographic hashing to prevent repeated outreach
  • ✔On-demand scrape trigger & live dashboard export (CSV)
  • ✔Authentication layer for private lead browsing & detail drilldown
Sign In View Live Dashboard

Why teams choose Shiiman Leads

Manual prospecting wastes hours. We automate discovery, enrichment, and freshness so sales teams spend time closing – not collecting.

Freshness

Updated on a 5‑minute cadence & manual trigger.

Accuracy

Deduplication prevents double outreach, reducing churn.

Coverage

JSON APIs + dynamic pages & JSON‑LD extraction.

Speed

Selective resource blocking during dynamic scraping.

How Shiiman Leads works

Ingest

Pulls from municipal JSON endpoints & dynamic corporate pages (Puppeteer when needed).

Filter

Applies status/date cutoffs + keyword & regex matching to isolate qualified items.

Enrich & Serve

Hashes, deduplicates, persists to SQLite; exposes API, dashboard, and CSV exports.

Get in touch

We respond within 1 business day.
